user.title: Colete - Setup
user.description: What would you like to set up?

track_parcel.title: Colete - Track a Parcel
track_parcel.description: Add a parcel to track. Enter the AWB number and optionally select the courier. If unsure, use Auto-detect.

data_description.awb: The tracking number (AWB) for the parcel
data_description.courier: Select the courier or use Auto-detect to try all supported couriers
data_description.friendly_name: A custom name for this parcel (e.g. 'New Laptop')
data_description.update_interval: How often to check for updates (300-3600 seconds, default 900)
data_description.retention_days: Days to keep the parcel after delivery (0 = keep forever, default 30)

imap_scanner.title: Colete - Email Scanner (IMAP)
imap_scanner.description: Connect to your email inbox to automatically detect and track parcels from shipping notification emails.

data_description.imap_email: Your email address used to log in
data_description.imap_password: Your email password or app-specific password (Gmail requires an App Password)
data_description.imap_lookback_days: How many days back to scan for shipping emails (1-90, default 7)
data_description.imap_scan_interval: How often to scan for new emails (60-3600 seconds, default 300)

error.awb_not_found: AWB not found. Please check the number and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the courier API. Please try again later.
error.imap_cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the IMAP server. Please check server, port, email, and password.
error.imap_invalid_folder: IMAP folder not found. Please check the folder name.

abort.already_configured: This AWB is already being tracked.

data_description.friendly_name: A custom name for this parcel
data_description.update_interval: How often to check for updates (300-3600 seconds)
data_description.retention_days: Days to keep the parcel after delivery (0 = keep forever)
data_description.imap_lookback_days: How many days back to scan for shipping emails (1-90)
data_description.imap_scan_interval: How often to scan for new emails (60-3600 seconds)
